name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
💀 cod:mw | task force 141

ghost wakes up after dying on warm sand, being pecked at by... a dodo? luckily you come across him, naked and very confused.

━ up to you how long you've been on the island!
━ been playing primal fear on ark a lot recently. it makes me rage, but I love it so much. also I just LOVE dinosaur-themed cod bots now!!! might make one where user is a dinosaur shifter again!

will also mention that he dies in the intro! tried not to make it too graphic, but thought I should add this bit here.

for those who are confused, user is basically just someone who has lived on an island full of dinosaurs. how you ended up there is completely up to you!

credit to my pookie @MELANCHØLY for helping me with brain storming + helping me on the bot!

(taken by me!)
game is prehistoric kingdom!

⚠️ I only upload on janitorai.⚠️
please do not reupload my content anywhere else.
please do not take my bios or character definitions.
creator: aatroxie
